(SC-105A) COURT ORDER FILED BY SET FOR SEP-11-2019 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDDIA LIMOUSINE SERVICE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROULAC GLOBAL, LLC. (OWNER STEPHEN ROULAC) $4,060.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,175.00, PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. MY AWARD IS BASED ON 18 HOURS OF SERVICE PLUS A $1000 CANCELLATION FEE FOR THE BUS THAT PLAINTIFF HAD TO CANCEL ON LATE NOTICE. I APPLY THE CONTRACT TERMS FROM THE PREVIOUS BOOKING WHICH DEFENDANT DID NOT OBJECT TO AT THIS BOOKING, BUT REDUCE CANCELLATION FEE IN LIGHT OF DEFENDANT'S PERFORMANCE CONCERNS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
